userOutcome: Operators can run dispatch-holds to see which features are held by the circuit breaker, why, and when holds expire.
scopeSummary: Add dispatch-holds subcommand to workflow_memory.py that calls list_dispatch_holds() and renders a human-readable table. Add --json flag for machine output.
readinessReason: dispatch_ledger.py already implements list_dispatch_holds(). Just needs CLI wiring.
handoffSummary: Add dispatch-holds subparser to workflow_memory.py. Handler calls list_dispatch_holds(root), renders feature/failures/holdUntil/lastError table for human mode, or JSON for --json. Register in command dispatch table and allowlist.
